gh_cd545c743aeb9b9011517e96.description:
📍 HCM | HN 

- 5+ years in Data Engineering, including 2+ years on GCP
- Strong experience building & optimizing ETL/ELT pipelines
- Hands-on with BigQuery and GCP Data Stack (Dataflow, Dataproc, Composer/Airflow, Dataform)
- Experience with Airflow/Composer, CI/CD for data pipelines
- Solid understanding of data modeling (Relational, Dimensional, Schema-on-Read)

✨ Nice to have: Oracle/MicroStrategy migration, Azure Data Stack, Chinese speaking.
 
Phone/Zalo: 0582839437
